title: Control Measure and Rhythm for Sustained Reading
summary: Build and verify css line measure spacing in long shift guidance readability investigation through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain css line measure spacing from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply css line measure spacing without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

options.text: Long shift guidance readability investigation case 1: tightly packed long lines make reading faster because more text fits on screen.

steps.title: 02 · Read the long shift guidance readability investigation case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 2: Which claim preserves css line measure spacing when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: long shift guidance readability investigation.

content.text: Readable prose needs appropriate line height, line measure, paragraph spacing, and restrained letter or word spacing. Very long tight lines increase tracking and return-sweep effort; very short lines fragment reading. Unitless line-height scales with text, ch can bound approximate measure, and text spacing must survive user overrides without clipping. Apply it to long shift guidance readability investigation.
